title: Podman inside podman throwing permission error
body:
### Issue Description


I am trying to run containers using Podman in **Rootless Mode**. Below is my command,
```bash
podman run -itd \
    --network ecosystem-net \
    --name network-test-1 \
    --hostname network-test-1 \
    --network-alias network-test-1 \
    -v /run/user/1000/podman/podman.sock:/root/podman/podman.sock:Z \
    docker.io/library/ubuntu:jammy bash
```
After connecting to the container, I am trying to access the podman inside podman on the mounted socket file using python `podman` package. But it throws below error.

```
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
PermissionError                           Traceback (most recent call last)
File /usr/local/lib/python3.10/dist-packages/podman/api/uds.py:41, in UDSSocket.connect(self, **kwargs)
     40 try:
---> 41     super().connect(netloc)
     42 except Exception as e:

PermissionError: [Errno 13] Permission denied
```

Also, cannot connect using `curl` command.
```
root@network-test-1:~# curl -v --unix-socket /root/podman/podman.sock http://localhost/version
*   Trying /root/podman/podman.sock:0...
* Immediate connect fail for /root/podman/podman.sock: Permission denied
* Closing connection 0
curl: (7) Couldn't connect to server
```

Permission for `podman.sock`
`0 srwxrwxrwx. 1 root root  0 Feb 12 10:05 podman.sock`

---

### Podman Version
```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.4.1
API Version:  4.4.1
Go Version:   go1.19.10
Built:        Thu Aug 17 13:30:33 2023
OS/Arch:      linux/amd64
```

### RPM -q podman
`podman-4.4.1-13.el9_2.x86_64`

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Install `python3` and install package `podman`.
```
pip install podman
```
Python Code:
```
from podman import PodmanClient

url = "unix:///root/podman/podman.sock"

```

Describe the results you received

### Privileged Or Rootless
